data.title: Perplexity Can Make 'Apple Intelligence Work' Says CEO Aravind Srinivas As iPhone Maker Attracts Criticism On Siri And AI Delays
data.description: Perplexity AI CEO Aravind Srinivas said on Thursday that "Perplexity will make Apple Intelligence work," responding to a social media post suggesting the artificial intelligence startup should replace Siri on iPhones.

data.title: Kevin O'Leary Blasts Tim Walz's Dig At Tesla Stock — He's Mocking A Company His Own Pension Fund Invests In
data.description: Kevin O'Leary slammed Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz for mocking Tesla's falling stock price given the state's pension fund holds 1.6 million shares in the company.

data.title: Larry Summers Calls Trump Tariffs 'Self-Inflicted Wound' As Fed Navigates Inflation Worries: 'Policy Is Moving In Wrong Direction'
data.description: Former Treasury Secretary Larry Summers warned on Thursday that President Donald Trump's tariff policies are creating a "self-inflicted wound" on the U.S. economy, pushing inflation up while threatening growth.

data.title: Malaysia Aviation Group Orders 30 Boeing 737 MAX Jets, Secures Option For 30 More Amid Rising Southeast Asia Demand
data.description: Malaysia Aviation Group announced an order for 30 Boeing Co. 737 MAX jets on Friday, with options for 30 more aircraft.

data.title: Intuitive Machines Gears Up For Q4 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
